pr.title: Record: Cosine TTT + Multi-Order N-gram Cache (3-seed mean val_bpb=0.9850)

output.summary: Combine per-layer cosine-LR TTT recovery with sliding-window multi-order n-gram cache using entropy-adaptive interpolation for final scoring.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Cosine TTT adaptation fine-tunes the model during evaluation on validation shards before scoring with the n-gram cache.
techniques: Per-layer cosine LR AdamW TTT recovery
Sliding-window multi-order n-gram interpolation with entropy-adaptive mixing
